title: Clarksburg West Virginia Association of Disability Examiners (CWVADE) — By-Laws
description: By-laws of the Clarksburg West Virginia Association of Disability Examiners (CWVADE), a NADE chapter for members working or residing in West Virginia. Articles cover name, affiliation, definitions, purpose, membership, finances (no dues beyond NADE; fiscal/membership years coincide with NADE), executive board (officers, immediate past president, regional board representative), officers (President, Vice-President, Secretary-Treasurer; one-year terms with one re-election), annual meetings governed by Robert's Rules, standing committees (Membership, Program, Nominations) and ad hoc committees, and the amendment procedure.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Clarksburg West Virginia (CWVADE) Chapter
source.title: Clarksburg West Virginia Association of Disability Examiners By-Laws

notes: Authoritative: this is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source document W.-Virginia-Clarksburg-Const-Bylavs.doc. The source filename contains a typo ('Bylavs' instead of 'Bylaws'); the real filename has been preserved exactly in this sidecar's name, id, and path (NOT corrected). The captured document is titled 'By Laws' and contains constitution-style articles (name, affiliation, purpose, membership, governance); no separate constitution section is present. No adoption/revision date is stated, so temporal_coverage is omitted. Distinct from the West Virginia (#59) no-bylaws note in this same directory. Related to the NADE regional constitutions/bylaws link index.
